source_quote: The average length of NICU stay in the control group was 33.77 ± 1.3 days, while for the experimental group the average stay was 23 ± 0.7 days. This difference in average hospital stay was statistically significant (F (1.292) = 36.65; p < 0.0001).
Table 5: Mouth opening Change - Interventional: Mean 0.9333, SD 2.7894, n=15; Control: Mean 0.8000, SD 2.0771, n=15; t-value 0.1485, p=0.8830
Table 9: Burning sensation Change - Interventional: Mean 0.53, SD 0.83, n=15; Control: Mean 0.67, SD 0.72, n=15; Z-value -0.4148, p=0.6783
Table 2: Interincisal distance at 3rd month - Group 1 (Conventional): 1.5 (1), Group 2 (Turmix): 0.82 (1.1), P=0.0877. The mean increase in IID was 3.13 mm and 1.25 mm respectively in groups 1 & 2.
Table 2: Burning sensation at 3rd month - Group 1 (Conventional): 15.6 (11.2), Group 2 (Turmix): 0 (0), P<0.0001. Complete resolution of burning sensation was noted with turmix.
